<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="256" height="256" viewBox="0 0 256 256">
  <!-- Black Background -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="400" fill="#000"/>
  
  <!-- Flower Center (White) -->
  <circle cx="200" cy="200" r="10" fill="#fff"/>
  
  <!-- Petals (Red, White, Red gradient) -->
  <g transform="translate(200,200)">
    <!-- Outer petals -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ff0000" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ff0000" opacity="0.8"/>
    
    <!-- Inner petals -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ff0000" opacity="0.8"/>
    
    <!-- Gradient effect on petals -->
    <defs>
      <linearGradient id="petalGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#ff0000;stop-opacity:1"/>
        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:1"/>
      </linearGradient>
    </defs>
    
    <!-- Applying gradient to outer petals -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="url(#petalGrad)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="url(#petalGrad)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="url(#petalGrad)" opacity="0.8"/>
    
    <!-- Applying gradient to inner petals -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="url(#petalGrad)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="url(#petalGrad)" opacity="0.8"/>
    
    <!-- Additional small petal details -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ff0000" opacity="0.6"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>
</svg>
